note: SPECTRA cross-framework reference — maps operationally relevant ATT&CK techniques to NIST 800-53 controls. Based on MITRE ATT&CK v14 and NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5.

mappings.rationale: Security awareness training addresses social engineering; boundary protection and email filtering block phishing delivery; malicious code protection detects payloads; spam protection filters phishing emails
Malicious code protection scans attachments; least functionality restricts dangerous file types; boundary protection filters at email gateways
Least functionality restricts scripting engines; malicious code protection detects script-based attacks; system monitoring tracks command execution; audit logging captures execution events
Configuration settings enforce constrained language mode and script block logging; monitoring detects suspicious PowerShell; least functionality can restrict PowerShell access
Access enforcement and least privilege limit who can create tasks; least functionality restricts task scheduler; monitoring detects suspicious task creation

mappings.attack_name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys
mappings.rationale: Configuration settings harden registry; file integrity monitoring detects unauthorized changes; least privilege restricts registry modification; system monitoring tracks registry operations

Access enforcement and least privilege limit access to credential stores; authenticator management protects credential material; protection at rest encrypts stored credentials; monitoring detects dumping activity
Configuration settings enable Credential Guard and RunAsPPL; access enforcement restricts LSASS access; system monitoring detects process access to LSASS; integrity verification detects tampering

Access enforcement restricts directory replication rights; least privilege limits who has replication permissions; audit logging captures replication requests; monitoring detects anomalous replication

mappings.attack_name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets: Kerberoasting
mappings.rationale: Account management ensures service accounts use strong passwords; authenticator management enforces password complexity; monitoring detects anomalous TGS requests; configuration settings enforce AES encryption

mappings.attack_name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets: Golden Ticket
mappings.rationale: Account management protects krbtgt account; authenticator management enforces regular krbtgt password rotation; monitoring detects ticket anomalies; integrity verification validates authentication tokens

mappings.attack_name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash
mappings.rationale: MFA through IA-2 mitigates hash-only authentication; configuration settings disable NTLM where possible; monitoring detects anomalous logon patterns; transmission protection encrypts credentials in transit
Configuration settings disable LLMNR and NBT-NS; least functionality removes unnecessary protocols; boundary protection segments network; monitoring detects poisoning activity
Access enforcement and least privilege restrict share access; remote access controls limit SMB exposure; boundary protection segments networks; monitoring detects lateral movement patterns
Remote access controls restrict WinRM usage; least privilege limits remote management capabilities; audit logging captures remote sessions; configuration settings harden WinRM
Access enforcement restricts WMI access; least privilege limits remote WMI; least functionality disables WMI where unnecessary; monitoring detects WMI-based execution

Access enforcement restricts process access rights; configuration settings enable exploit protection; malicious code protection detects injection; monitoring tracks suspicious process behavior; integrity verification detects memory tampering

mappings.attack_name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Bypass User Account Control
mappings.rationale: Least privilege sets UAC to highest enforcement; configuration settings harden UAC behavior; monitoring detects UAC bypass patterns; integrity verification detects auto-elevation abuse

mappings.attack_name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools
mappings.rationale: Access enforcement prevents unauthorized security tool modification; configuration settings enforce tamper protection; monitoring detects defense disablement; integrity verification validates security tool state
Audit logging ensures event collection; audit record generation maintains log pipeline integrity; monitoring detects ETW tampering; integrity verification validates logging infrastructure

mappings.attack_name: Indicator Removal: Clear Windows Event Logs
mappings.rationale: Audit logging and generation ensure events are captured; centralized log review detects gaps; monitoring alerts on log clearing; least privilege restricts log management access
Least functionality restricts download tools; boundary protection filters inbound transfers; malicious code protection scans downloaded files; monitoring detects tool staging
Boundary protection inspects HTTP/HTTPS traffic; monitoring detects C2 beaconing patterns; audit logging captures network connections; continuous monitoring provides ongoing detection
Boundary protection monitors DNS traffic; system monitoring detects tunneling patterns; audit logging captures DNS queries; configuration settings enforce DNS security
Boundary protection detects tunneled protocols; monitoring identifies covert channels; audit logging captures connection details; least functionality restricts tunnel-capable tools
Least functionality restricts BITS access; monitoring detects suspicious BITS jobs; audit logging captures BITS operations; configuration settings limit BITS capabilities
Least functionality reduces proxy execution surfaces; malicious code protection detects malicious DLL loads; monitoring tracks rundll32 execution patterns; audit logging captures command lines
Least functionality disables mshta where unnecessary; malicious code protection scans HTA files; monitoring detects mshta execution; boundary protection blocks remote HTA loading
Least functionality restricts regsvr32; malicious code protection detects scriptlet abuse; monitoring tracks proxy execution; audit logging captures command-line arguments
Least functionality restricts CMSTP access; monitoring detects INF-based execution; least privilege prevents UAC bypass exploitation; audit logging captures CMSTP invocations
Access enforcement restricts account enumeration; least privilege limits visibility into directory services; monitoring detects enumeration activity; audit logging captures discovery commands

mappings.attack_name: Archive Collected Data: Archive via Utility
mappings.rationale: Monitoring detects archive tool usage on sensitive data; audit logging captures file operations; least functionality restricts archive utilities; access enforcement limits data access

Boundary protection monitors and restricts outbound protocols; system monitoring detects anomalous transfers; audit logging captures network activity; information flow enforcement restricts data movement

Monitoring detects suspicious file staging operations; audit logging captures file movement; access enforcement restricts write access to staging locations; configuration settings protect sensitive directories

Access enforcement restricts service management; least privilege limits service control; configuration settings protect critical services; monitoring detects mass service stops; contingency planning ensures recovery

Contingency planning and backups enable recovery; system recovery restores operations; malicious code protection detects ransomware; monitoring detects mass encryption; least privilege limits encryption capability

Vulnerability scanning identifies exploitable flaws; boundary protection restricts application exposure; flaw remediation patches vulnerabilities; developer testing validates security; monitoring detects exploitation attempts

Account management tracks authorized accounts; least privilege limits account capabilities; MFA hardens authentication; authenticator management enforces credential hygiene; audit review detects anomalous use

Unsuccessful logon attempts trigger lockout; MFA requires additional factors; authenticator management enforces password complexity; monitoring detects brute force patterns; audit logging captures failed authentications

Access enforcement restricts task creation; least privilege limits scheduling capabilities; least functionality disables unnecessary schedulers; monitoring detects suspicious task activity; audit logging captures task operations
